purpose: Declare whether an unmarked syllable in each imported reading source is an explicit neutral-tone notation or merely missing tone information.

unihan.basis: The checked-in merged Unihan export is normalized as marked Pinyin; unmarked syllables are retained as explicit neutral forms.

pypinyin.basis: The checked-in phrase-pinyin export uses marked Pinyin and leaves neutral-tone syllables unmarked.

wanxiang.basis: Wanxiang dictionary readings use tone-marked Pinyin and represent neutral-tone syllables without a tone mark.
